title: Mutual retailer triples boss’s pay to £2.2m despite fall in profits
summary_full: OurCoop criticised by members after withholding annual profit-share payment despite soaring executive payOurCoop, the independent mutual which runs about 500 food stores across England, is facing criticism from members after it more than tripled the boss’s pay to £2.2m despite falling sales and profits.The chain, which is a separate company from the Co-op Group but relies on the much bigger business to supply some products, has not approved an annual profit-share payment to members this year, although they have received discounts on shopping. Continue reading...
